title: echium italicum subsp. albereanum
intro: Echium italicum subsp. albereanum is a subspecies of the Echium italicum plant, also known as the Italian bugloss or Italian echium, a biennial or perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Echium italicum subsp. albereanum include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Echium italicum subsp. albereanum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
